title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers

seo.title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers: Authentic Turkish Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn to make delicious Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers at home! This authentic Turkish recipe features tender chicken marinated and grilled to perfection. Get the full recipe here!

seo.imageAlt: Platter of grilled Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers with fresh vegetables and rice, ready to serve.
seo.imageCaption: Savor the taste of Turkey with these perfectly grilled Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers, a delightful meal for any occasion.

description: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers are a beloved staple of Turkish cuisine, featuring tender pieces of chicken marinated in a flavorful blend of yogurt, olive oil, and spices, then grilled to perfection. These succulent skewers offer a delightful balance of smoky char and juicy tenderness, making them an irresistible dish for any occasion. They are typically served with rice, fresh vegetables, and flatbread, embodying the vibrant tastes of the Mediterranean.

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken
instructions.text: Cut the chicken breasts into uniform 1-inch cubes. This ensures even cooking and allows the marinade to penetrate effectively.

instructions.title: Make the Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine the plain yogurt, olive oil, tomato paste, minced garlic, red pepper flakes (pul biber), dried oregano, salt, black pepper, and fresh lemon juice. Whisk until all ingredients are thoroughly combined into a smooth, aromatic marinade.

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: Add the cubed chicken pieces to the prepared marinade, tossing gently to coat every piece evenly. Cover the bowl tightly and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or preferably overnight, to allow the flavors to infuse deeply into the chicken.

instructions.title: Skewer the Chicken
instructions.text: If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for at least 30 minutes to prevent them from burning on the grill. Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the skewers, making sure not to pack them too tightly, which allows for even cooking and charring.

instructions.title: Preheat Grill
instructions.text: Preheat your grill (charcoal, gas, or even a grill pan) to medium-high heat, approximately 400-450°F (200-230°C). Lightly oil the grill grates to prevent the chicken from sticking.

instructions.title: Grill the Skewers
instructions.text: Place the chicken skewers on the preheated grill. Cook for 15-20 minutes, turning them every 4-5 minutes, until the chicken is golden brown, slightly charred, and cooked through with an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).

instructions.title: Rest and Serve
instructions.text: Once cooked, remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for a few minutes before serving. This crucial step helps the juices redistribute, ensuring the chicken remains tender and moist. Serve hot with traditional Turkish sides like pilaf, fresh salad, or lavash bread.

tips: For extra tenderness, ensure your yogurt is full-fat and allow the chicken to marinate for at least 4 hours, or ideally overnight.
Do not overcrowd the skewers or the grill. Give each skewer enough space to cook evenly and develop a beautiful char.
Serve Tavuk Sis immediately after resting with a side of traditional Turkish rice pilaf, a fresh shepherd's salad (Çoban Salata), and warm pita or lavash bread.
article: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers is a beloved Turkish Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
